title: BVEST 2020 - Word War 2020
subtitle: The objective of this event was to bring together ideas and solutions to real-world problems.
description: Title of the event: Word WarObjective: The objective of this event was to bring together ideas and solutions to real-world problems. It helped create an environment where young changemakers could come together and discuss how to solve problems in the form of a debate.In this event a 1vs1 debate competition was held where the topics were chosen from the Sustainable Development Agenda for 2030.
